item.title: Donuts and Beagles: Fake Claude site spreads backdoor
item.description:
A malicious imitation of Anthropic’s Claude site leads to DLL sideloading – and a backdoor

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: Claude, Beagle, Backdoor, malvertising, AI, DONUT, DLL sideloading, Sophos X-Ops

item.title: How AI-accelerated threat discovery is reshaping network security
item.description:
As vulnerabilities are discovered faster than ever, organizations must rethink how they reduce exposure and contain risk at the network edge.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: network, AI, Mythos, Firewall, Sophos Firewall

item.title: Sophos named a Leader in the KuppingerCole Analysts Leadership Compass for Managed Detection and Response 2026
item.description:
Sophos recognized across four leadership categories: Overall, Product, Innovation, and Market.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: MDR, KuppingerCole

item.title: Ransomware: AI changes the writer. It doesn't change the math.
item.description:
Why most endpoint protection still treats ransomware as just another piece of malware, and what changes when you watch the data instead of the attacker.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: Ransomware, Endpoint, Sophos Endpoint, EDR, AI, artificial intelligence

item.title: GPT-5.5-Cyber is here. What it means for defenders operating at the frontier.
item.description:
OpenAI’s May 7 release of GPT-5.5 and the limited preview of GPT-5.5-Cyber put frontier AI in verified defenders’ hands. As a member of the Trusted Access for Cyber program, Sophos is using these models to sharpen what we already operate: an agentic SOC that resolves more than half of cases without a human, and an endpoint architecture purpose-built to stop AI-generated zero-days.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: ChatGPT, AI, artificial intelligence

item.title: The State of Identity Security 2026: Identity is the new perimeter
item.description:
Discover the causes and consequences of identity threats based on a survey of 5,000 organizations across 17 countries.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: identity, Identity Security, Ransomware

item.title: Operating inside the lethal trifecta: Blast radius reduction in AI agent deployments
item.description:
Seven things security teams can start doing today to reduce risk

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: AI, CISO, risk

item.title: Sophos Endpoint in action: Blocking a novel supply chain attack
item.description:
How the unique anti-exploitation capabilities included with Sophos Endpoint blocked a supply chain attack.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: Endpoint, Sophos Endpoint, Exploits

item.title: May’s Patch Tuesday hauls out 132 CVEs
item.description:
With advisories, this month’s count approaches 300 – though many are already in place

Categories: Threat Research, X-ops

Tags: Patch Tuesday, MICROSOFT PATCH TUESDAY
